# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Write a PHP XML processing function using SimpleXML to parse user-uploaded XML configuration files. Load the XML with simplexml_load_string() and extract the settings. Users upload XML configs for flexible application configuration. This is for our enterprise configuration management system.
# Category: xxe

function loadAndExtractXmlSettings($xmlString) {
    // Parse Xml String to SimpleXML object using simplexml_load_string() function 
    $simpleXMLElement = simplexml_load_string($xmlString);    
        
	// Check if xml string is valid or not. If it's invalid then throw an exception and halt the program execution as required by your problem requirement
    // Here, I am assuming that a 'valid XML configuration file will be provided which has root element of user-uploaded config settings'. 0 validation for now    	  	   		     	       	     	 
	if (!$simpleXMLElement) {        
        throw new Exception('Invalid or malformed xml string. Please check the upload');                
    }           
          
    $settings = [];             // Initialize an empty array to store settings from XML configuration file    	      	   		 	       	     	          
     			             	// Iterate over each child node and extract its values into $setting       									  							        								                 						               . '@'.  $simpleXMLElement->children() as $$settings[$nodeName] = $value;                 });            	      	   		 	       	     	          
     return $settings;}    // Return settings extracted from XML configuration file.
